title: High Molecular Weight DNA Extraction from Algae Using SoCK Method
author: Benoît Vacherie
materials: Lysis Buffer Reagents Final Concentration 1 Tris HCl ph8 100 mM 2 EDTA 20 mM 3 CTAB 2 % 4 NaCl 1.4 M 5 PEG 8000 1 % 6 H2O Qsp 20 ml

steps.title: Sorbitol pre-wash buffer
steps.instruction: Sorbitol pre-wash buffer : the buffer can be stored for 6 months at 4°C Reagents Final Concentration 1 Tris HCl ph8 100 mM 2 EDTA 5 mM 3 Sorbitol 700 mM 4 PVP 40 1% 5 H2O Qsp 100 ml

steps.title: Put a mortar in ice
steps.instruction: Put a mortar in ice. Cool the mortar and pestle with liquid nitrogen until the bubbling stops. Liquid Nitrogen Contributed by users

steps.title: Grind 1g of frozen sample to a fine powder (approx
steps.instruction: Grind 1g of frozen sample to a fine powder (approx. 2 min), without adding liquid nitrogen. 1 g 00:02:00

steps.title: Add 20 ml of Sorbitol pre-wash...
steps.instruction: Add 20 ml of Sorbitol pre-wash Buffer in a 50 ml tube. 20 mL, Sorbitol buffer

steps.title: Transfer powder to sorbitol pre-wash buffer
steps.instruction: Transfer powder to sorbitol pre-wash buffer

steps.title: Add 20 µl of 2-Mercaptoethanol and...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µl of 2-Mercaptoethanol and vortex 5 s 2-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M6250

steps.title: Centrifuge 5 minutes with low deceleration...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 5 minutes with low deceleration 5000 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7

steps.title: Carrefully remove the supernatan t without resuspending the pellet
steps.instruction: Carrefully remove the supernatan t without resuspending the pellet.

steps.title: Perform a second sorbitol wash as...
steps.instruction: Perform a second sorbitol wash as above (step 3 + 7 + 8 +9)

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with 20 ml of Lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with 20 ml of Lysis buffer .

steps.title: Add 50 µl of 2-Mercaptoethanol and...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µl of 2-Mercaptoethanol and 40 µl of RNaseA (100mg/ml) and vortex 5 s 2-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M6250 RNaseA Thermo Fisher Catalog #12091021

steps.title: Incubate 1h at 65°C with low...
steps.instruction: Incubate 1h at 65°C with low agitation (300 rpm) 01:00:00 65 °C

steps.title: Centrifuge 10 minutes with low deceleration...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 10 minutes with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7

steps.title: Gently transfer the supernatant to a new 50 ml tube
steps.instruction: Gently transfer the supernatant to a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: Add
steps.instruction: Add : - 0.1 vol of absolute ethanol Ethanol absolute Contributed by users (CAS: 64-17-5) - 0.25 vol of KAc 3M Potassium Acetate Contributed by users - 1 vol of chloroform isoamyl alcohol Chloroform Isoamyl alcohol 24:1 Merck

steps.title: Vortex 5 sec and incubate 20...
steps.instruction: Vortex 5 sec and incubate 20 min at -20°C 00:20:00 -20 °C

steps.title: Centrifuge 20 minutes with low deceleration...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 20 minutes with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7

steps.title: Gently transfer the aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Gently transfer the aqueous phase to a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: Add
steps.instruction: Add : - 0.8 vol of isopropano l 2-Propanol (IsoPropanol) Bio Basic Inc. Catalog #PC8601.SIZE.4L - 0.1 vol of NaAc 3M Sodium acetate P212121 - 0.2% of 2-Mercaptoethanol 2-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M6250

steps.title: mix gently by inversion 10 times...
steps.instruction: mix gently by inversion 10 times and incubate 1h at -20°C 01:00:00 -20 °C

steps.title: Centrifuge 20 minutes with low deceleration...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 20 minutes with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7

steps.title: Carefully discard the supernatant, gently resuspend...
steps.instruction: Carefully discard the supernatant, gently resuspend the pellet with 1 ml of cold 70% ethanol. 70% Ethanol Contributed by users

steps.title: Transfer the resuspended DNA to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the resuspended DNA to a 1.5 ml DNA LoBind tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge 10 minutes with low deceleration...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 10 minutes with low deceleration 5000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7

steps.title: Carefully discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully discard the supernatant. Air dry the pelle t at RT for about 10 minutes. 00:10:00

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with 50-100 µl of 1X TE buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with 50-100 µl of 1X TE buffer. 1X TE buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 1 mM EDTA) Contributed by users

steps.title: Allow the DNA to resuspend for...
steps.instruction: Allow the DNA to resuspend for 2 hours at 55°C or ON at RT. 02:00:00 55 °C

steps.title: Store the DNA at 4°C
steps.instruction: Store the DNA at 4°C.

steps.title: Quantify your sample with a Qubit DNA HS assay
steps.instruction: Quantify your sample with a Qubit DNA HS assay. Check the purity of the sample with a Nanodrop (measurements of 260/280 and 260/230 absorbance ratios). Estimate the molecular weight of the sample with a Tapestation and/or a Femto pulse

steps.title: Depending on the DNA concentrations and...
steps.instruction: Depending on the DNA concentrations and DNA length profiles, deplete short DNA molecules using SRE size selection kits (SRE XS, SRE or SRE XL kits).

steps.title: QC results obtained on different species
steps.instruction: QC results obtained on different species. (3 green algae and 3 red algae)
